summary: Tested new favorite button features: venue card hearts, sidebar favorite button, header heart icon, and favorites page integration. All desktop features PASS. Found critical mobile bug - venue cards on mobile search page do NOT show heart buttons.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile venue cards (lines 454-505) do NOT include heart/favorite button. Desktop uses VenueCard which has hearts, but mobile uses separate MobileVenueCard component that lacks this feature.
ui_bugs.selector: N/A - button missing entirely from mobile card

action_items: Add heart/favorite button to MobileVenueCard component in VenueSearchPage.js (lines 454-505). Should match the heart button implementation from VenueCard.js - use useFavorite hook and add heart button next to 'Verified' badge.
critical_code_review_comments: VenueCard.js correctly implements useFavorite hook with e.preventDefault() and e.stopPropagation() to prevent navigation
VenueSearchPage.js has two card components: VenueCard (desktop, with heart) and MobileVenueCard (mobile, WITHOUT heart) - inconsistent UX
Header.js correctly shows heart icon for both authenticated and unauthenticated users (data-testid='header-favorites-btn')
VenueDetailPage.js sidebar-favorite-btn implementation is correct and syncs with hero heart button
context_for_next_testing_agent: MobileVenueCard in VenueSearchPage.js needs heart button added. All other favorite features work correctly. Key data-testids: venue-card-fav-{venue_id} (desktop only), sidebar-favorite-btn (detail page), header-favorites-btn (header), favorite-venue-{venue_id} (favorites page), remove-favorite-{venue_id} (favorites page remove button). localStorage key is 'favoriteVenues'.

desktop_search_page.TEST 1 - Heart buttons on venue cards: PASS - Found 20 heart buttons with data-testid='venue-card-fav-*'
desktop_search_page.TEST 2 - Initial heart state (outline): PASS - Heart buttons start unfilled with bg-white/90
desktop_search_page.TEST 3 - Click adds to localStorage: PASS - Venue ID added to localStorage 'favoriteVenues' array
desktop_search_page.TEST 5 - Toggle off removes from localSt: PASS - Second click removes venue from favorites

venue_detail_page.TEST 6 - Hero button syncs with sidebar: PASS - Both show red when favorited
venue_detail_page.TEST 7 - Toggle off works: PASS - Reverts to 'Save to Favorites' outline style

mobile_tests.TEST 1 - Mobile venue cards have hearts: FAIL - MobileVenueCard component does NOT include heart button
mobile_tests.TEST 2 - Mobile venue detail hero heart: PASS - Heart visible in mobile header
mobile_tests.TEST 3 - Mobile sidebar favorite button: PASS - 'Save to Favorites' button visible and tappable at 293x50px

feature_verification.venue_card_hearts_mobile: NOT WORKING - MobileVenueCard missing heart button

rca_of_issue.issue: Mobile venue cards missing heart/favorite button
rca_of_issue.root_cause: VenueSearchPage.js uses separate MobileVenueCard component (lines 454-505) for mobile view which was not updated to include the heart button when the feature was added to VenueCard.js
rca_of_issue.fix_suggestion: Import useFavorite hook and add heart button to MobileVenueCard similar to VenueCard.js lines 120-136
